title: Texas Hold 'Em
why_this_song: Texas Hold 'Em by Beyoncé (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: So lay your cards down, down, down, down
Ooh, one step to the right
We headed to the dive bar we always thought was nice
Ooh, run me to the left
Then spin me in the middle, boy, I can't read your mind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "round" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "round" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "real" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "real" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh, one step to the right

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh, you run to the left

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Texas Hold 'Em" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Texas Hold 'Em"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Beyoncé one question about "Texas Hold 'Em", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Beyoncé sobre "Texas Hold 'Em", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Texas Hold 'Em" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Texas Hold 'Em" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Texas Hold 'Em" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Texas Hold 'Em" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
